title: Make Oiticica evals prove skill lift
description: Restore the 20pp skill-lift gate and reshape generated eval prompts so without-skill runs should fail while with-skill runs pass by relying on SKILL.md rather than prompt scaffolding.
notes: Reshaped generated eval prompts so they no longer name the skill or teach the review shape; moved source-model and repair shapes into SKILL.md; restored AGENT_SKILLS_EVAL_MIN_DELTA=0.20. Validation passed: python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_skills.py; python3 scripts/generate_skills.py --check; bash -n scripts/link_skills.sh scripts/validate_skills.sh scripts/skill_ci_scope.sh scripts/run_skill_ci_validation.sh; node --check scripts/check_eval_deltas.js; focused direnv exec . bash scripts/validate_skills.sh oiticica-description; focused direnv exec . bash scripts/validate_skills.sh oiticica-solecism oiticica-meter oiticica-style-qualities; full direnv exec . bash scripts/validate_skills.sh with 210/210 assertions passing and all 35 skills at with-skill passRate 1.
close_reason: Completed after restoring 20pp lift gate and full validation passed with 210/210 assertions.

title: Document Oiticica example sources
description: Add agents/openai.yaml for each generated Oiticica skill and agents/notes.md documenting public-domain English-classic sources and the prompt/example boundary.
notes: Added generated agents/openai.yaml and agents/notes.md for all 35 Oiticica skills, documented public-domain source boundaries, and brought over skills-style focused/full validation workflow scripts. Validation passed: python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_skills.py; python3 scripts/generate_skills.py --check; bash -n scripts/link_skills.sh scripts/validate_skills.sh scripts/skill_ci_scope.sh scripts/run_skill_ci_validation.sh; node --check scripts/check_eval_deltas.js; focused validate_skills.sh runs for oiticica-description and oiticica-solecism; SKILL_VALIDATION_MODE=focused wrapper for oiticica-description; full direnv exec . bash scripts/validate_skills.sh with 210/210 assertions passing.
close_reason: Completed after full validation passed with 210/210 assertions.

title: Run and refine Oiticica skill evals
description: Run all agent-skills-eval cases for the oiticica-style skills, refine weak eval examples without bloating SKILL.md definitions, and report per-skill failures that indicate weak skill behavior.
notes: Ran model-backed evals. Initial run without explicit temperature produced 151/210, mainly because positive model prompts did not require explicit concept/preservation/rubric checks. Added temp-0 eval config, tightened positive and negative eval prompts, replaced abstract dissertation/style-qualities examples, and clarified antithesis eval behavior. Final temp-0 full suite: 210/210.
close_reason: Final temperature-0 eval run passed 210/210; eval prompts and examples refined without expanding skill definitions.

title: Scaffold Oiticica style skills project
description: Create a standalone oiticica-style skill repository modelled after skills/, with link_skills.sh installing only skills and one concise English skill per first-part Manual de Estilo concept, including objective rubrics and concrete evals from English classics.
notes: Implemented scaffold with 35 oiticica-prefixed skill directories, each with SKILL.md and evals/evals.json. Validation passed: py_compile generator, generator --check, bash -n link script, json.tool all evals, temporary link run, and skill-validator strict over src. Delivered in the local commit containing this closed Bead export. No push requested or performed.
close_reason: Validation passed: python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_skills.py; python3 scripts/generate_skills.py --check; bash -n scripts/link_skills.sh; python3 -m json.tool over all evals; CODEX_HOME=/tmp/oiticica-style-codex CLAUDE_HOME=/tmp/oiticica-style-claude bash scripts/link_skills.sh; skill-validator check --emit-annotations --strict --skip links --allow-dirs evals --allow-flat-layouts src. Delivered in the local commit containing this closed Bead export. No push requested or performed.

title: Reframe README around Oiticica taxonomy
description: Make the README language-first, keep the full grouped skill list visible, soften the DOPS caption, and add contributing documentation for generated skill workflow.
notes: Reframed README around Oiticica's language taxonomy, restored the full grouped skill catalogue, softened the DOPS caption, added docs/CONTRIBUTING.md, and changed scripts/generate_skills.py so README.md is hand edited while --check validates every generated skill link is present. Validation passed: python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_skills.py; python3 scripts/generate_skills.py --check; python3 scripts/generate_skills.py with no src diff; bash -n scripts/link_skills.sh; test -f assets/jose-oiticica-dops.jpg; test -f docs/CONTRIBUTING.md; direnv exec . bash scripts/validate_skills.sh oiticica-concision. Skipped full all-skill evals because skill content and eval logic did not change.
close_reason: Committed README taxonomy framing, hand-edited README validation boundary, and contributing docs after focused validation.

title: Verify and commit README improvements
description: Check README links, asset references, and documented commands after user edits, then commit the documentation update.
notes: Checked README links and instructions after user edits. Fixed broken references to nonexistent docs/SKILLS.md and docs/CONTRIBUTING.md, corrected link script wording to mention both Codex and Claude skill directories, corrected validation example to use direnv exec . bash scripts/validate_skills.sh oiticica-concision, removed duplicate contributing bullet, and moved README text into scripts/generate_skills.py because README.md is generated. Validation: test -f assets/jose-oiticica-dops.jpg; test README-linked src skill files and AGENTS.md; python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_skills.py; python3 scripts/generate_skills.py --check; bash -n scripts/link_skills.sh; direnv exec . bash scripts/validate_skills.sh oiticica-concision. Skipped broader all-skill evals because the changed surface is README/generator docs text plus one documented sample validation command.
close_reason: Committed README verification and generator-template fix after focused README, generator, shell, and single-skill validation.

title: Shorten README image caption
description: Revise the Oiticica README image caption to avoid duplicate source attribution and add a short researched context note about the 1924 arrest, while keeping archival source details in the license section.
notes: Shortened README caption to avoid duplicating the APERJ/DOPS source line already kept in the license section. Caption now gives researched context from CeDInCI: Oiticica's 1924 arrest followed the armed Sao Paulo tenentista uprising, and in prison he began a primer on anarchist doctrine. Validation: test -f assets/jose-oiticica-dops.jpg; reviewed README caption, license note, and git diff. Skipped skill evals because this is README/assets documentation only.
close_reason: Completed as an amendment to the README image attribution commit after README/source review.

title: Add Oiticica README image and license note
description: Add the José Oiticica DOPS archival image to README.md using the centered image style from nearby repositories, with factual caption and licensing/source note that omits Estel Negre.
notes: Added centered README image block for assets/jose-oiticica-dops.jpg, factual caption with DOPS/prontuário context, 1924 date, and APERJ/DOPS via CeDInCI source. Added README license/source note. Validation: confirmed asset path exists with test -f assets/jose-oiticica-dops.jpg and reviewed README diff; skipped skill evals because this is docs/assets-only.
close_reason: Completed in README/assets commit after confirming image path and reviewing README diff.
